fields.title: Catan
fields.description: A classic board game about settling an island, gathering resources, trading and building roads, settlements and cities.

fields.title: Carcassonne
fields.description: A tile-placement game where players build cities, roads and monasteries while competing for points through area control.

fields.title: Pandemic
fields.description: A cooperative board game where players work together as disease-fighting specialists trying to stop global outbreaks.

fields.title: Ticket to Ride
fields.description: Players collect train cards and claim railway routes across the map to connect cities and complete destination tickets.

fields.title: Dixit
fields.description: A creative party game with surreal illustrations where players give clues and try to guess the correct card.

fields.title: Azul
fields.description: An abstract strategy game where players draft colorful tiles and place them on their boards to score points efficiently.

fields.title: Family Favorites
fields.description: Easy to learn and enjoyable games for relaxed evenings with friends or family.

fields.title: Co-op Night
fields.description: Games where players work together instead of competing with each other.

fields.title: Strategy Picks
fields.description: Games for players who enjoy planning, efficiency and long-term decisions.

fields.text: A very accessible classic. Trading works especially well with four players.
Great cooperative gameplay. It feels tense and encourages real teamwork.
Beautiful design and very satisfying decisions for such a compact game.
Works really well at casual gatherings and helps even shy players join in.
